feedback: The network coverage in Udaipur old town is terrible with dead zones everywhere and the internet speed barely reaches 200 Mbps when connected. Both connectivity and throughput are failing simultaneously making this operator practically unusable for daily needs. The signal consistency gives me confidence for important calls.

Network coverage in Jayanagar new township is terrible and the internet speed of 500 Mbps is unusable. Customer support has been completely unhelpful about the issue despite multiple escalations over weeks. Compared to my previous operator this is a significant improvement.

The indoor coverage in Hubli airport road is absolutely terrible. I work from home and have to stand near the window for every call. In 2026 having to hunt for signal spots inside your own apartment is absurd. This operator needs massive infrastructure investment here.
Standard coverage in Udaipur but data validity too short.

The covrage in Warangal is middling. Outdoors it works adequately and indoors it is hit or miss depending on the building. For my mostly outdoor calling patterns it is sufficient but I would not recommend it to someone who needs strong indoor signl.

the network coverage in marathahalli industrial zone is excellent with full bars evwhere and the internet speed of 200 mbps makes everything from streaming to work calls effortless, both connectivity and throughput have been consistently reliable throughout my entire subscription period

The netwrk fails me daily in Mangalore. Between my home and office in hill area there are at least four spots where signl drops to zero for several minutes. This causes missed calls interrupted video meetings and constant frustration. Nothing has improved despite complaints.
Best operator for covrage in Chandigarh hands down.

The network coverage situation in Marathahalli city center has become intolerable over the past three months. Dead zones have multiplied signal drops happen multiple times daily and indoor coverage is practically nonexistent. For the premium I pay monthly this level of unreliability is completely unacceptable.

Coverage in Vadodara outskirts is standard neither good nor bad. The billing however has shown incorrect charges of Rs 399 extra this month. Network is average but billing errors are concerning. I would recommend this operator based on coverage alone.
Coverage reliable and 5G speeds impressive in Malad.

The network performance in Noida during peak festival season impressed me greatly. While friends on other operators complained about congestion and drops my connection remained rock solid with full signal throughout the busy period. Clear infrastructure advantage. Other users in my locality report the same experience consistently.
Coverage good speed good but billing wrong.
Dead zones in Varanasi terrible support and overpriced plans.
Signal strong but calls still drop in Indore.
Coverage terrible in Noida and support is useless.
Average covrage average speed and standard pricing.
Coverage is outstanding even indoors in Visakhapatnam.

I travel extensively within Rajkot for work visiting different highway stretch locations daily and the network coverage has been consistently excellent everywhere. Basement offices rooftop cafes crowded markets — signal is strong in every scenario I encounter. I would recommend this operator based on coverage alone.
Cannot get signal in half of Vadodara.

The coverage in Dehradun is middling. Outdoors it works adequately and indoors it is hit or miss depending on the building. For my mostly outdoor calling patterns it is sufficient but I would not recommend it to someone who needs strong indoor signal.

Network signal in Trivandrum near station is standard for what operators provide these days. Works fine most of the time with occasional weak spots that are not frequent enough to be a major problem. Neither praiseworthy nor complaint-worthy in my daily experience.
Coverage excellent but data balance runs out fast.

The network coverage in Whitefield industrial zone is average. Some spots have strong signal while others are weaker but overall it works for basic calling and messaging. Not the best coverage I have experienced but also not problematic enough to warrant switching to another operator at this point.

I want to specifically praise the network coverage in Gachibowli IT corridor which was previously a known dead zone for most operators. Since their tower upgrade last month the signal has been full bars consistently making daily life much more convenient for everyone here.

Poor coverage in Kozhikode but support is trying and pricing is fair at Rs 349. The network is bad but at least they are affordable and responsive about the issue. The infrastructure investment in this area is clearly showing results.
Standard covrage in Kharadi but data validity too short.

The network coverage in Madurai is average nothing remarkable. However the internet speed when connected is genuinely fast at 100 Mbps. The signal itself is mediocre but the throughput on that mediocre signal is surprisingly good. This level of coverage reliability is exactly what I expect.
Coverage neutral and billing has errors.

The network coverage in Agra city center is average. Some spots have strong signal while others are weaker but overall it works for basic calling and messaging. Not the best coverage I have experienced but also not problematic enough to warrant switching to another operator at this point.

signal strength in kanpur is outstanding and call quality over this network is crystal clear without any drops or echo, both the coverage and the voice service r performing at premium levels consistently. This level of coverage reliability is exactly what I expect.
Poor coverage but at least speed is good.

the coverage in chandigarh is good and speeds r fast but the daily data balance of 1.5gb runs out too quickly at these speeds, good network undermined by insufficient data allocation. The infrastructure investment in this area is clearly showing results.
Dead zones but call quality clear when connected.

poor coverage in marathahalli but support is trying and pricing is fair at rs 199, the network is bad but at least they r affordable and responsive about the issue. This level of coverage reliability is exactly what I expect.

Great coverage but internet speed is disappointing.

covrage on the highway between Secunderabad and nearby towns is seamless now. Previously there were multiple stretches with zero signl but they have clearly added towers because the connectivity is uninterrupted end to end. Great for daily commuters. The signal consistency gives me confidence for important calls.
Poor coverage but at least speed is good in Mumbai. Other users in my locality report the same experience consistently.
